name: Tor Browser
description: Anonymous web browsing Tool: https://torproject.org/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #795 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Tor Browser output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
parameters.help: Host, URL or path the tool acts on. When implementing, consider type 'target' or 'url' so the runner enforces the engagement scope.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: Offline mode: a saved Tor Browser output file to parse instead of running it live.
